# Soft7 Tool350 Grep15 Contract

## Soft 7
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.07 with quality bias floor 0.05 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Tool 350
tool result budgets default to 350 chars with 4-char previews for denser reclaim

## Grep 15
Grep head defaults to 15 lines for denser search results

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status/footer vitest
